events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established with Armenia on December 25, 1991, but no physical mission yet opened.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on December 25, 1991, when President George H.W. Bush announced the decision in an address to the nation regarding the dissolution of the Soviet Union.

events.event_description: The American Embassy in Yerevan was opened on February 3, 1992, with Steven Mann as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: The American Embassy in Yerevan was opened on February 3, 1992, with Steven Mann as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.
